key_drivers: Real yields falling sharply (-16bps over week to 1.97%) providing strong tailwind for gold, tech equities, and risk assets broadly
BoJ hawkish pivot with ~70% probability of April rate hike priced in, combined with risk-off VIX (23.87) driving strong JPY safe-haven bid
China manufacturing PMI recovered to 50.4 in March (first expansion in 5 months), supporting AUD and commodities; credit spreads narrowing from 3.46 to 3.17 HY OAS
